last_planning_summary: Task 120 locked the v0.3 public distribution state: README.md and README.ko.md are public-facing visual pamphlets; source and local binary paths are factual from this checkout; hosted release binaries remain release-gated until GitHub Release archives and checksums exist; the curl installer remains release-gated until verified against those real assets; Homebrew remains planned with no published tap or formula; no-terminal mode is assisted unless a trusted runner supplies exact CLI proof; model workspace packs are UX, not authority; and ni-kernel remains pre-runtime and does not execute downstream work. The CLI readiness gate reported READY, AMEND-010 was applied, ni relock wrote .ni/plan.lock.json, and ni run compiled .ni/generated/v0.3-distribution-release.prompt.txt within the 4000-character budget.

recent_decisions.title: v0.3 distribution release state is factual and release-gated where needed

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
notes.locked_docs: Session state must not override locked docs.
notes.completion: Session state must not mark docs complete.
notes.raw_transcript: Raw transcript is not the source of truth.
